activities.comment: And so it begins again. An inglorious start just 1.50 miles. Hope to improve on mileage as the days progress.
Walked a mile with Eddie before and after spending most of the day at the Heartland 50mile/50K/25K races. Walked 2.25 additional on the course at Teterville rd aid station.
Warming up today, 87° kind of a blahs day, didn't do much of anything today.¯\_(ツ)_/¯
Walked just 0.53 miles out side. Then retreated to the treadmill due to rain and lightning ⚡️⛈️ 6.30 miles on the treadmill in 2:16
Walked 2.75 miles with Eddie. Then got out of the rain and on the treadmill and did 4.25 miles
Walked 2.5 miles with Eddie🐕 and 3.75 miles to Central and Maize loop. A cool 53° tonight.
Walked 3.25 miles with Eddie and 3.30 miles tonight.
Walked 2.18 miles with Eddie and 7.00 miles on my "go to" 6 mile loop. Found a marble, dime, nickel and a pocket knife, (sadly the blade was broken.)
Walked a few miles with Eddie and did the Maize - Tyler square. 69° out tonight. Found a dime.🤑
Walked 2 miles with Eddie and 4.41 miles tonight. Chilly 60° out tonight🥶 found a quarter 🤑

Walked 0.41 miles early this morning with Eddie before heading to the hospital and 1.60 miles at the hospital while waiting in between pre & post-op. Then 2.5 miles with Eddie this afternoon. Later Tonight 6.58 miles at 60°
Walked 2.4 miles with Eddie and 8.8 miles tonight out to the P.O. to buy some stamps and mail bills🤑🤮🤣
Walked three miles with Eddie and 6.3 miles later tonight at 68°. Found a penny.
Walked 3.30 miles today at 95°, 3.0 with Eddie and 2.0 more later tonight.
Warm day and evening. Walked 2.5 miles with Eddie and 7.0 miles tonight. Tested out my new headlamp/belt light again. Got at least 3 hours tonight. Will recharge battery and try longer tomorrow.
Walked 1.47miles this morning with Eddie before our trip to KC. 7.46 miles after we got back home.
Walked 2.0 miles with Eddie and 8.0 miles tonight. Testing out my new headlamp. 3 1/2 hours on high beam. Found a nickel🤑.
Walked this afternoon at 95° out 🥵 tonight at 55° out 🥶 Just a mile with Eddie 🐕 the rest solo.
Walked only 1.67miles with Eddie this morning since he had surgery on his head this afternoon 🤕 7.08 miles tonight at  cool 55°🥶
Walked 0.5 miles with Eddie today, limited activities for him due to yesterday's surgery.🤕 8.81 miles tonight after workout with Holly and Royals game on TV. Chilly 57° tonight.
Walked 8.77 miles tonight a pleasant 62° out. Including about 1.5 miles with Eddie 🐕

Walked 1.15 with Eddie🐕and 7.00 miles tonight. Racing the forecasted rain showers.🌧Modified my route when I saw lightning🌩⚡ off in the distance. Headed for home and stayed near shelter to finish my miles for today.
Only walked 1 mile with Eddie today, since his incision was bleeding a little. 7 miles tonight at 59°.

Limited walk with Eddie just 1.0 mile🐕 Had to put the cone around his neck since he kept scratching at his incision 🤦‍♂️ Walked 10.00 miles starting at 87°🥵 cooled to a pleasant 75° by the time I was done. Found three dimes.
Walked 1 mile with Eddie 🐕 and six miles to KUS storage unit to get SKA buckles. 69° out tonight. Found a lug nut.
Walked 2 miles with Eddie🐕 and 5.02 miles earlier today. Nearing the full moon.🌔
Walked 6 miles early this morning. Then 2.11 miles with Eddie 🐕, also including mowing the yard.
4:00pm to midnight first "day" of "The Sticks" 2026
Friday mileage at "The Sticks."
Saturday mileage at "The Sticks."
Sunday and final day, (15 hours).
Post race recovery walk with Eddie and unloading the car.
Just a little recovery walk with Eddie. Eddie is also recovering, got stitches on his head taken out.🤕
Walked with Eddie 🐕 today. We're both just about recovered from our separate adventures🤣
Walked 2.25 miles with Eddie in between the rain showers.
Walked .50 miles with Eddie and 2.0 miles later tonight a humid 77Â°ð¥µ
Walked 1.10 miles with Eddie and Mavis and 2.15 miles later tonight. A pleasant 77°
Walked 2 miles with Eddie and Mavi this afternoon and 1.58 miles later tonight.
Walked with Eddie and Mavi 1.0 mile today at 95° and 1.15 miles tonight at 70°.
Walked 1.0 miles with Eddie 🐕and Mavi🐕 and 1.02 miles later with just Eddie🐕.
Walked 1.06 miles with Eddie🐕this morning and 3.50 miles this afternoon from Dillon's to home at 96°🥵 Found two pennies and a 7/16" socket. Plus mowed the yard too.
Walked 3.50 miles to change a flat tire for Karen this afternoon. A mile with Eddie this morning and 1.05 miles with Eddie tonight. Found eight pennies🤑
Walked 16.172 miles in first 5 1/2 hours at Heat Wave 6/12/24 races this evening. Plus 0.86 miles with Eddie at home before the race.
Walked 15.932 miles in the last six hours of the Heat Wave☀️🔥🌡6/12/24 hour races this morning. Plus 1.13 miles with Eddie🐕 back at home later today.
Walked just 2.52 miles with Eddie🐕 today.
Walked 2.22 miles with Eddie🐕 wanted to stay close to home in case Karen Kutie Pie needed me.
